string.text: Find all possible information about the "Crystal" group
The Inquisitor suggested I personally get to know the once legendary group of "Monolith" defenders and find some information about them.
Rebirth: Talk to the first brother
Rebirth: Talk to the second brother
Rebirth: Talk to the third brother
Rebirth: Talk to the fourth brother
Rebirth: Share thoughts with the Mentor
Well, it’s interesting... I wonder why he doesn’t suspect me?
Alright, stop seeking revenge and return to the Radar, our soldiers need help. Talk to Gryphon; he’s in charge of our "Wings" group.
Mentor: \nFor now, follow the Inquisitor’s orders, they’ll still need your help. You can come to me later.
Need to take back the Laundry from the stalkers.
The only noteworthy document is Order №66, which mentions that the "Item №62" sample, along with all related documentation, was delivered to the NIIChAZ.
If you have time, drop by. Something rather trivial has come up.
The Brotherhood wants to use the "Burner" again. I hope everything goes well.
The Mentor informed me that our group needs help at the Radar. It looks like something big is starting.
Who pulled me into this... at least they gave me some grenades.
I don’t know what’s going to happen this time.
The day you’ve been waiting for has come. Go through the trials, and the Monolith will give you what you desire most.
Gryphon: \nNow we need to head to the far end of the complex. Alright, guys, be careful – who knows what’s waiting for us here.
Gryphon: \nHere it is, the control room. Honestly, it doesn’t look great. Alright, soldiers, let’s discuss our next steps.
Mentor: \nHey, the one on the far left – I’ll be waiting for you shortly, there’s some work ready for you.

Mentor: \nWell, are you done? I wish I could’ve seen his face at that moment, ha-ha-ha. Now head to the Radar, our reconnaissance team "Wings" is waiting for you there, and you’ll fall under the commander’s guidance. He’ll bring you up to speed.

Similar to the standard Monolith suit, though lighter and more comfortable compared to its predecessor. Tailored to fit the new realities of the Brotherhood, offering enhanced protection from radiation and psi-radiation.
Mentor: \nGreetings, soldiers of the new Monolith!
Mentor: \nYou are our only hope for the future, brothers. Soon, I will test each of you separately to see if you deserve to be in our ranks.
Mentor: \nFor now, you’re free. Everyone except for you, the one on the far left. I’ll start with you.
